name: [WIP] Graphics Hub
author: automata-rtx
description: Hosts the screen-space infrastructure that other graphics mods build on, applying it so added effects layer correctly with the game's original rendering instead of over-applying on top of it. Bundles three features, each with its own section in the settings: Depth to Normal (reconstructs a per-pixel world-space surface normal from the depth buffer and publishes it as a service that ambient occlusion, GI and shadow mods consume - keep this mod enabled for SSILVB and Realtime Sun Shadows), Water Plane (probes the water-surface height at the player each frame and publishes it as a service so AO/GI mods can fade their effect underwater - passive, a pure query with no on/off and no cost unless another mod reads it), and Deferred Fog (re-applies the game's fog after screen-space effects composite, so they darken the world under the fog instead of the fog itself). EXPERIMENTAL
